name: MacBook Air M4
description: Apple MacBook Air with M4 chip, 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display, 16GB unified memory, 256GB SSD. Incredibly thin and light design with all-day battery life.

name: Dell XPS 15
description: Dell XPS 15 with Intel Core i7-13700H, 15.6-inch 3.5K OLED display, 16GB DDR5 RAM, 512GB SSD. Premium build quality with stunning display.

name: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
description: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra with 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, 200MP camera, S Pen included, 256GB storage. The ultimate Android experience.

name: Sony WH-1000XM6
description: Sony WH-1000XM6 wireless noise-cancelling headphones. Industry-leading ANC, 40-hour battery life, multipoint connection, and Hi-Res audio support.

name: iPad Pro M4 11"
description: Apple iPad Pro with M4 chip, 11-inch Ultra Retina XDR display, 256GB storage. The most powerful and versatile iPad ever.

name: Classic Fit Cotton Oxford Shirt
description: Premium cotton Oxford shirt in classic fit. Available in white, blue, and pink. Perfect for both casual and business casual settings.

name: Slim Fit Wool Blazer
description: Tailored slim-fit wool blazer. Perfect for formal occasions and office wear. Features notch lapel and two-button closure.

name: Ultraboost Running Shoes
description: Adidas Ultraboost running shoes with responsive Boost cushioning, Primeknit upper, and Continental rubber outsole. Designed for everyday running.

name: Cashmere Crew Neck Sweater
description: Luxuriously soft cashmere crew neck sweater. Lightweight yet warm. Available in versatile neutral colors.

name: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: By Martin Kleppmann. The definitive guide to distributed systems, databases, and data processing. Covers reliability, scalability, and maintainability.

name: Deep Learning with Python
description: By François Chollet. Practical deep learning from the creator of Keras. Covers computer vision, NLP, and generative models with TensorFlow/Keras.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: By David Thomas & Andrew Hunt. 20th Anniversary Edition. The classic guide to software craftsmanship, covering everything from personal responsibility to architectural patterns.

name: Clean Code
description: By Robert C. Martin. A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Learn to write code that is readable, maintainable, and professional.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
description: Dyson V15 Detect cordless vacuum with laser dust detection, piezo sensor for particle counting, and 60-minute fade-free runtime.

name: Nespresso Vertuo Next
description: Nespresso Vertuo Next coffee machine with Centrifusion technology. Brews 5 cup sizes from espresso to carafe. WiFi connected.

specs.Sizes: Espresso, Double, Gran Lungo, Mug, Carafe

name: Ember Temperature Control Mug 2
description: Ember Mug 2 with precision temperature control. Set your ideal drinking temperature via app. 1.5-hour battery life on the go, all day on charging coaster.

name: Philips Hue Starter Kit
description: Philips Hue White and Color Ambiance starter kit with 4 smart bulbs and Hue Bridge. Control 16 million colors via app or voice assistants.

name: LG C4 65" OLED TV
description: LG C4 65-inch 4K OLED evo TV with Alpha 9 AI processor. Perfect blacks, infinite contrast, and cinema-quality picture. Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos support.

name: Levi's 501 Original Fit Jeans
description: The iconic Levi's 501 Original Fit jeans. Straight leg, button fly, and authentic raw denim. The blueprint for every pair of jeans since 1873.

name: Build: An Unorthodox Guide to Making Things Worth Making
description: By Tony Fadell. The legendary iPod and Nest designer shares hard-won lessons from his career at Apple and beyond. Essential reading for product builders.
